paper.title_en: Effects of Solar Wind Plasma Noise on Stochastic Gravitational Wave Background Searches with the LISA-Taiji Network
paper.abstract_en: The LISA-Taiji dual detector network improves millihertz SGWB sensitivity through cross correlation measurements. Solar wind plasma, however, can generate plasma noise correlated between detectors and bias SGWB cross correlation estimates. We use high time resolution electron density data from Wind/SWE, estimate the solar wind electron density fluctuation spectrum with the Lomb-Scargle method, and propagate the resulting plasma noise to the TDI A/E channels of the LISA-Taiji network. By including finite arm propagation, Taylor frozen flow spatial correlations, and the network overlap reduction response, we compute the SGWB parameter bias induced by interdetector plasma noise. Although the single detector plasma residual is below the reference noise, the component correlated between detectors can enter the SGWB cross correlation estimator directly. Under dual detector scale coverage, the plasma induced parameter bias for a power law SGWB can reach 12.73% of the corresponding Fisher parameter uncertainty. For M2/M3 cosmic string spectra, the bias in ln Gmu can reach 19.26% of the corresponding Fisher parameter uncertainty for the network configurations, observing times, and frequency bands considered here. These results show that the impact of solar wind plasma noise cannot be assessed from the single detector residual noise level alone. In LISA-Taiji SGWB searches, the interdetector correlated component of this noise can directly affect parameter estimation.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 该论文研究LISA-Taiji网络中太阳风等离子体噪声对随机引力波背景搜索的影响，属于脉冲星计时阵列（PTA）相关主题，具有较高的理论深度和方法论严谨性。
decision.title_zh: 太阳风等离子体噪声对LISA-Taiji网络中随机引力波背景搜索的影响
decision.abstract_zh: LISA-Taiji双探测器网络通过互相关测量提高了毫赫兹随机引力波背景（SGWB）的灵敏度。然而，太阳风等离子体可能产生在探测器之间相关的等离子体噪声，并偏置SGWB互相关估计。我们使用来自Wind/SWE的高时间分辨率电子密度数据，采用Lomb-Scargle方法估计太阳风电子密度涨落谱，并将由此产生的等离子体噪声传播到LISA-Taiji网络的TDI A/E通道中。通过考虑有限臂传播、泰勒冻结流空间相关性和网络重叠降低响应，我们计算了探测器间等离子体噪声引起的SGWB参数偏差。虽然单个探测器的等离子体残差低于参考噪声，但探测器间相关的分量可能直接进入SGWB互相关估计器。在双探测器尺度覆盖下，对于幂律SGWB，等离子体引起的参数偏差可达相应Fisher参数不确定度的12.73%。对于M2/M3宇宙弦谱，在我们考虑的配置、观测时间和频段下，ln Gmu的偏差可达相应Fisher参数不确定度的19.26%。这些结果表明，太阳风等离子体噪声的影响不能仅从单个探测器残差噪声水平来评估。在LISA-Taiji的SGWB搜索中，该噪声的探测器间相关分量可能直接影响参数估计。
